feature: Force EnterWorktree at the start of every Claude Code session and merge worktree back to main at end of session. Strategy: (1) Session start hook automatically creates a worktree and switches into it, so all work is isolated from main. (2) Session end / stop hook merges the worktree branch back to main (rebase + fast-forward) and cleans up the worktree. This ensures every session works in isolation and main only gets clean, verified merges.
